---
name: Bug or Improvement
about: Report a content issue or suggest an improvement to existing entries
title: "[BUG/IMPROVEMENT] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Type

- [ ] Content error (wrong description, outdated info, typo)
- [ ] Missing information
- [ ] Structural / navigation issue
- [ ] Other

## Location 📄

- **Page**: (e.g. `docs/en/security/iam.md`)
- **Section**:

## Description

Describe the issue or improvement clearly.

## Suggested Fix

If you have a suggestion on how to fix or improve it, describe it here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have checked this is not already reported in another issue
- [ ] I have provided enough context to reproduce or understand the issue
